title: Astonish Specialist Hob Cream Cleaner, for Tough Burnt on Stains, Protective Coat, Zesty Lemon Scent, 500ml
features: Kills 99.9% Bacteria: Astonish Specialist hob cream cleaner works hard to lift away dirt and the toughest of stains, leaving surfaces hygienically clean
Protective coat: The cream polishes to reveal a sparkling shine, leaving a protective coating to help protect the surface from future spills
Zesty Lemon Scent: Put some zest in your kitchen, we’ve developed our specialist antibacterial hob cleaner with an uplifting and mood boosting lemon scent
Multi Use: Perfect for use on ceramic, glass induction and halogen hobs as well as microwaves and general worktop surfaces

Vegan and Biodegradable: Astonish is the only UK manufactured household cleaning brand that is approved by Cruelty Free International, The Vegan and Vegetarian Society. The bottle is also fully recyclable
description: Product Description Restore your hob’s shine with Astonish Specialist Hob Cream Cleaner, specially designed to tackle tough burnt-on food and grease. This 500ml non-scratch cream formula gently lifts stubborn stains while leaving behind a protective layer to help guard against future grime build-up. Safe for use on ceramic, glass, and induction hobs, it delivers a sparkling clean and a fresh zesty lemon scent. Like all Astonish products, it’s vegan, cruelty-free, and proudly made in the UK — powerful on dirt, gentle on your appliances. Directions Shake well before use. Apply with a clean, damp cloth or sponge. Leave for 5 minutes. Wipe gently using circular motion. Periodically rinse the cloth or sponge with warm water. For heavily soiled surfaces repeat as above. CAUTION: Allow surfaces to cool before product use. The product is a mild abrasive and care must be taken when cleaning polished surfaces. Always test on an inconspicuous area before use. Do not use on gold, silver, pewter, non-stick coatings, lacquered surfaces or polished plastic surfaces. Do not use on hob decals or transfers.
